controller_models.label: Steam Deck Built-in Controller
controller_models.note: Primary target: right trackpad mouse, left trackpad radial hotkeys, gyro opt-in.

controller_models.label: Steam Controller
controller_models.note: Same abstraction as Deck controls, but with external Steam Controller hardware.

controller_models.label: Xbox / XInput Controller
controller_models.note: Baseline portable gamepad model for SDL/XInput-style controllers.

controller_models.label: DualShock 4
controller_models.note: PlayStation layout with touchpad available for mouse or menu bindings.

controller_models.label: DualSense
controller_models.note: DualShock-family mapping plus DualSense-specific trigger capability metadata.

controller_models.label: Nintendo Switch Pro Controller
controller_models.note: Nintendo layout model; face-button labeling can be handled above emulator keymaps.

emulation_backends.label: Linux uinput
emulation_backends.note: Fast automated Linux smoke tests for emitted key/button events.

emulation_backends.label: evemu record/replay
emulation_backends.note: Replay captured physical controller events into the same keymap pipeline.

emulation_backends.label: Linux UHID
emulation_backends.note: Use when Steam needs a HID-shaped device instead of a generic uinput pad.

emulation_backends.label: InputPlumber
emulation_backends.note: Preferred route for Deck-style trackpad/radial/keyboard composition.

emulation_backends.label: Steam Input / Game Mode
emulation_backends.note: Final integration layer; requires visual/live Steam verification.

verification_profiles.label: Steam Deck Game Mode final pass

steam_deck.description: Steam Deck built-in controls with gyro opt-in, right trackpad as mouse, and left trackpad radial hotkeys.
steam_deck.hotkey_button: View; L4/R4 optional in Steam Input templates

hotkeys.label: Pause / Resume
hotkeys.note: Primary pause toggle for emulator cores and standalone emulators.

hotkeys.label: Take Screenshot
hotkeys.note: Screenshot command for emulators that expose a keyboard hotkey.

hotkeys.label: Open Menu
hotkeys.note: Open the emulator quick menu when supported.

hotkeys.label: Quit Emulator
hotkeys.note: Unified exit command for Game Mode.

hotkeys.label: Previous State Slot
hotkeys.note: Move to the previous save-state slot.

hotkeys.label: Next State Slot
hotkeys.note: Move to the next save-state slot.

hotkeys.label: Save State
hotkeys.note: Save to the current save-state slot.

hotkeys.label: Rewind
hotkeys.note: RetroArch rewind where the core supports rewind.

hotkeys.label: Escape
hotkeys.note: Plain escape for menus and desktop-oriented components.

templates.title: Semu: Steam Deck - Neptune SIMPLE
templates.note: Generated Steam Input template; doctor validates it and steam-input install copies it.

templates.title: Semu: Steam Deck - Neptune FULL
templates.note: Optional full hotkey layout for users who want RetroDeck-style chords.

tools.note: KDE fallback when grim is not installed.
X11 fallback for emulator windows that require XWayland.

hooks.note: Captures the desktop state immediately before launching an emulator.
Captures the emulator after the process has had time to present its first frame.
Captures the return path after the emulator exits, usually back to ES-DE.
CLI hook for VM/Deck verification scripts when a process is already running.

bios.note: Beetle PSX expects user-supplied PlayStation BIOS dumps.
PCSX2 needs at least one legally dumped PS2 BIOS image.
Ryujinx needs dumped Switch keys and firmware from the user's console.
Cemu needs user-supplied Wii U keys for encrypted content.
Flycast can use HLE for many games, but original BIOS files improve compatibility.
